claim_under_attack: The cost of maintaining optionality (10-15% resource drag) is bounded and acceptable relative to the downside risk of full commitment to a direction that may prove wrong on 3 of 4 unresolved unknowns.
evidence_or_reason: The artifact asserts a specific 10-15% resource drag and labels it acceptable, but provides no visible basis, calculation method, benchmark, or scenario analysis for that estimate. It also does not quantify the comparative downside of single-track commitment, so the claimed tradeoff is not actually evidenced in the text; it is presented as a conclusion without supporting support.
